limitations: AI investment intensity scored 3 (not 4) because no explicit dollar amounts are disclosed for AI-specific R&D or AI infrastructure spend; the Elo and Photoneo acquisitions are automation/machine-vision related but not exclusively AI-attributable
Narrative concreteness scored 4 rather than 5 because no quantified business results (%, $, time saved) are provided for deployed AI use cases — descriptions are operational but unquantified

Risk disclosure includes named risk categories and regulatory mechanisms (EU AI Act) with some scenario specificity, but no quantified risk exposure or named internal oversight body, limiting score to 4
